CS 322: Computer Architecture and Operating Systems

Lab Notes (Koko)

I developed a chatbot, called Koko, to study Assembly programming with you. You can use it from Facebook Messenger from the link: https://m.me/koko.assistant

Feedback

Like our lab sessions? Tell me what you like most to keep doing it. Don’t like our lab sessions? Tell me to improve what you don’t like.
